title: Photo To Sports Miniature Figurine Edit AI
sourceTitle: Photo To Sports Miniature Figurine Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image sports miniature figurine transformation for same face, hair silhouette, and expression from the provided photo, preserving the uploaded identity while converting the person into a realistic isometric collectible figure. Subject: adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. same face, hair silhouette, and expression from the provided photo remains recognizable in the miniature face, hair silhouette, and expression, while the full body becomes a detailed sports figurine in an iconic athletic uniform performing a signature move. Scene: city sidewalk with soft urban background and enough depth behind the subject provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Square 1080-style centered isometric view: full body visible, figure balanced on an implied clean base, signature action pose readable from head to shoes, with toy-scale proportions kept realistic. Signature Elements: Preserved photo to sports miniature figurine edit source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Realistic miniature collectible figurine with premium toy detail, subtle material finish, crisp edges, 4K product-render clarity, and minimal sports display styling. Color Palette: White background, uniform colors inferred from the sports concept, natural skin and hair tones from the reference, and restrained product-shadow neutrals. Lighting: Soft product photography light with gentle contact shadows, clean edge highlights, and enough depth to show the miniature form without dramatic poster lighting. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
